title: Accounts Staff (Kallang Way)
description:
Company Overview:

CR Consultancy Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based professional services firm that supports small and medium-sized enterprises with accounting, tax, payroll, and corporate compliance solutions. Our purpose is to help businesses operate efficiently and stay compliant, allowing them to focus on growth with confidence.

Since our establishment, we have grown into a team of over 80 professionals serving clients across multiple industries. Our team gains hands-on exposure and practical experience while delivering reliable, technology-enabled solutions. We are committed to building an inclusive workplace where individuals are valued, supported, and given opportunities to grow their careers.

Responsibilities:  

  • You will be working from home and need to visit client office 3 days in a week, the time you spend in client office is likely to be full day 8am to 5pm. Client location is on Kallang Way.

  • Promptly address client queries especially outstanding Accounts-related matters not able to clear by our backend teams.

  • Support and handle the accounts work for multiple clients (3-5).

  • Handle and able to close full set of accounts with reasonable accounting principles independently.

  • This role is performance-based and result-orientated. 

  • You are not expected to perform overtime (OT) beyond 44 hours work week, and we will attempt to smooth out your workload. 

  • With over 80 staff, there is room for career progression to other roles with us. 

Requirements: 

  • Xero knowledge/ hands on experience are preferred. Alternatively, you need to take a 10 hours online training to be Xero Certified Advisor before hiring. 

  • Must be able to interact and write reasonably in English  

  • Must have reasonable accounting qualification and experiences  

  • Corporate laptop can be provided for certain area's candidate, and applicants must have decent Internet speed (speed test of minimum 20mbps). 

Why Join CR Consultancy

We are a growing professional services firm with over 80 staff, committed to creating an inclusive and supportive environment where our people can learn, grow, and succeed together. We are committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion, ensuring every individual feels valued, respected, and treated fairly. Our team is given the opportunity to gain hands-on exposure across multiple clients and industries, strengthening both technical expertise and professional confidence. With a flexible hybrid and remote work arrangement, clear performance-based recognition, and genuine career progression opportunities, we empower our employees to take ownership of their career journey while maintaining a healthy work–life balance.

postedCompany.description:
We are a growing outsourced accounting firm with more than 40 staffs. 


We have a team of staff working on each client, and we hire a lot of stay home mothers. The client team structure allows us to offer flexi part time working arrangement, and supports you whenever you are unavailable. 


We have very limited overtime working hours, and we offer off days if you need to clear your work during weekends or overtime in case.
postedCompany.name: CR CONSULTANCY PTE. LTD.
